message:
test(acl): expand core_acl from 29 to 69 conformance cases (total 2081)

Add AUTH command tests (unauthenticated, correct credentials, wrong password,
disabled user, nonexistent user), ACL DELUSER with multiple users, ACL SETUSER
resetpass/allcommands/allkeys, ACL GENPASS error boundaries, ACL CAT string
category order verification, wrong arity for DELUSER/GETUSER/SETUSER/SAVE/LOAD,
and full user cleanup verification.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -21,7 +21,7 @@ Non-negotiable policy:
 | RDB/AOF persistence | in_progress | AOF record frame contract implemented; Store→AOF rewrite serialization (all data types + TTL), atomic file I/O (write_aof_file/read_aof_file), Runtime::load_aof replay, SAVE/BGSAVE/BGREWRITEAOF wired to actual persistence; RDB snapshot format pending |
 | Replication baseline | in_progress | state/offset progression scaffolded; protocol sync semantics pending |
 | ACL/config mode split | in_progress | ACL command subsystem implemented (AUTH, ACL SETUSER/GETUSER/DELUSER/LIST/WHOAMI/CAT/GENPASS/LOG); CONFIG GET/SET implemented in fr-runtime with full glob pattern matching and multi-pattern support; full parameter surface pending |
-| Differential conformance harness | in_progress | fixture runner online for `core_strings`, `core_errors`, `core_hash`, `core_list`, `core_set`, `core_zset`, `core_geo`, `core_stream`, `core_generic`, `core_acl`, `core_hyperloglog`, `core_bitmap`, `core_transaction`, `core_connection`, `core_expiry`, `core_client`, `core_server`, `core_scripting`, `core_pubsub`, `core_replication`, `core_sort`, `core_scan`, `core_config`, `core_cluster`, `core_copy`, `core_function`, `core_wait`, `protocol_negative`, and `persist_replay` suites (2041 core conformance cases) |
+| Differential conformance harness | in_progress | fixture runner online for `core_strings`, `core_errors`, `core_hash`, `core_list`, `core_set`, `core_zset`, `core_geo`, `core_stream`, `core_generic`, `core_acl`, `core_hyperloglog`, `core_bitmap`, `core_transaction`, `core_connection`, `core_expiry`, `core_client`, `core_server`, `core_scripting`, `core_pubsub`, `core_replication`, `core_sort`, `core_scan`, `core_config`, `core_cluster`, `core_copy`, `core_function`, `core_wait`, `protocol_negative`, and `persist_replay` suites (2081 core conformance cases) |
 | Benchmark + optimization artifacts | in_progress | round1 + round2 baseline JSON, syscall profile, and expanded golden checksum artifacts added |
 | Full command/API surface closure | not_started | program-level closure row; all deferred families must roll up here before release sign-off |

@@ -312,6 +312,363 @@
         "kind": "array",
         "value": []
       }
+    },
+
+    {
+      "name": "auth_without_password_configured",
+      "now_ms": 30,
+      "argv": ["AUTH", "somepass"],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "error",
+        "value": "ERR AUTH <password> called without any password configured for the default user. Are you sure your configuration is correct?"
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "auth_wrong_arity_no_args",
+      "now_ms": 31,
+      "argv": ["AUTH"],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "error",
+        "value": "ERR wrong number of arguments for 'AUTH' command"
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "auth_wrong_arity_too_many",
+      "now_ms": 32,
+      "argv": ["AUTH", "user", "pass", "extra"],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "error",
+        "value": "ERR wrong number of arguments for 'AUTH' command"
+      }
+    },
+
+    {
+      "name": "acl_setuser_with_password_for_auth",
+      "now_ms": 40,
+      "argv": ["ACL", "SETUSER", "testuser", "on", ">secret123"],
+      "expect": { "kind": "simple", "value": "OK" }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "auth_correct_user_pass",
+      "now_ms": 41,
+      "argv": ["AUTH", "testuser", "secret123"],
+      "expect": { "kind": "simple", "value": "OK" }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "acl_whoami_after_auth",
+      "now_ms": 42,
+      "argv": ["ACL", "WHOAMI"],
+      "expect": { "kind": "bulk", "value": "testuser" }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "auth_wrong_password",
+      "now_ms": 43,
+      "argv": ["AUTH", "testuser", "wrongpass"],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "error",
+        "value": "WRONGPASS invalid username-password pair or user is disabled."
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "auth_nonexistent_user",
+      "now_ms": 44,
+      "argv": ["AUTH", "nobody", "pass"],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "error",
+        "value": "WRONGPASS invalid username-password pair or user is disabled."
+      }
+    },
+
+    {
+      "name": "acl_setuser_disabled_user",
+      "now_ms": 50,
+      "argv": ["ACL", "SETUSER", "disabled_user", "off", ">pass456"],
+      "expect": { "kind": "simple", "value": "OK" }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "auth_disabled_user_rejected",
+      "now_ms": 51,
+      "argv": ["AUTH", "disabled_user", "pass456"],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "error",
+        "value": "WRONGPASS invalid username-password pair or user is disabled."
+      }
+    },
+
+    {
+      "name": "acl_deluser_multiple_setup_user2",
+      "now_ms": 60,
+      "argv": ["ACL", "SETUSER", "user2", "on"],
+      "expect": { "kind": "simple", "value": "OK" }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "acl_deluser_multiple_setup_user3",
+      "now_ms": 61,
+      "argv": ["ACL", "SETUSER", "user3", "on"],
+      "expect": { "kind": "simple", "value": "OK" }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "acl_deluser_multiple_at_once",
+      "now_ms": 62,
+      "argv": ["ACL", "DELUSER", "user2", "user3"],
+      "expect": { "kind": "integer", "value": 2 }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "acl_getuser_user2_gone",
+      "now_ms": 63,
+      "argv": ["ACL", "GETUSER", "user2"],
+      "expect": { "kind": "bulk", "value": null }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "acl_getuser_user3_gone",
+      "now_ms": 64,
+      "argv": ["ACL", "GETUSER", "user3"],
+      "expect": { "kind": "bulk", "value": null }
+    },
+
+    {
+      "name": "acl_deluser_mix_existing_nonexistent",
+      "now_ms": 65,
+      "argv": ["ACL", "SETUSER", "user4", "on"],
+      "expect": { "kind": "simple", "value": "OK" }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "acl_deluser_mix_count",
+      "now_ms": 66,
+      "argv": ["ACL", "DELUSER", "user4", "nonexist"],
+      "expect": { "kind": "integer", "value": 1 }
+    },
+
+    {
+      "name": "acl_setuser_resetpass",
+      "now_ms": 70,
+      "argv": ["ACL", "SETUSER", "rpuser", "on", ">mypass"],
+      "expect": { "kind": "simple", "value": "OK" }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "acl_setuser_resetpass_apply",
+      "now_ms": 71,
+      "argv": ["ACL", "SETUSER", "rpuser", "resetpass"],
+      "expect": { "kind": "simple", "value": "OK" }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "acl_getuser_after_resetpass",
+      "now_ms": 72,
+      "argv": ["ACL", "GETUSER", "rpuser"],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "array",
+        "value": [
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "flags" },
+          { "kind": "array", "value": [{ "kind": "bulk", "value": "off" }] },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "passwords" },
+          { "kind": "array", "value": [] },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "commands" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "+@all" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "keys" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "~*" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "channels" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "&*" }
+        ]
+      }
+    },
+
+    {
+      "name": "acl_genpass_negative_error",
+      "now_ms": 80,
+      "argv": ["ACL", "GENPASS", "-1"],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "error",
+        "value": "ERR ACL GENPASS argument must be the number of bits for the output password, a positive number up to 4096"
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "acl_genpass_too_large_error",
+      "now_ms": 81,
+      "argv": ["ACL", "GENPASS", "4097"],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "error",
+        "value": "ERR ACL GENPASS argument must be the number of bits for the output password, a positive number up to 4096"
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "acl_genpass_extra_args_error",
+      "now_ms": 82,
+      "argv": ["ACL", "GENPASS", "128", "extra"],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "error",
+        "value": "ERR unknown subcommand or wrong number of arguments for 'ACL'. Try ACL HELP."
+      }
+    },
+
+    {
+      "name": "acl_deluser_wrong_arity",
+      "now_ms": 83,
+      "argv": ["ACL", "DELUSER"],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "error",
+        "value": "ERR unknown subcommand or wrong number of arguments for 'ACL'. Try ACL HELP."
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "acl_getuser_wrong_arity",
+      "now_ms": 84,
+      "argv": ["ACL", "GETUSER"],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "error",
+        "value": "ERR unknown subcommand or wrong number of arguments for 'ACL'. Try ACL HELP."
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "acl_setuser_wrong_arity",
+      "now_ms": 85,
+      "argv": ["ACL", "SETUSER"],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "error",
+        "value": "ERR unknown subcommand or wrong number of arguments for 'ACL'. Try ACL HELP."
+      }
+    },
+
+    {
+      "name": "acl_save_wrong_arity",
+      "now_ms": 86,
+      "argv": ["ACL", "SAVE", "extra"],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "error",
+        "value": "ERR unknown subcommand or wrong number of arguments for 'ACL'. Try ACL HELP."
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "acl_load_wrong_arity",
+      "now_ms": 87,
+      "argv": ["ACL", "LOAD", "extra"],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "error",
+        "value": "ERR unknown subcommand or wrong number of arguments for 'ACL'. Try ACL HELP."
+      }
+    },
+
+    {
+      "name": "acl_log_invalid_subcommand",
+      "now_ms": 88,
+      "argv": ["ACL", "LOG", "BADCMD"],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "error",
+        "value": "ERR unknown subcommand or wrong number of arguments for 'ACL'. Try ACL HELP."
+      }
+    },
+
+    {
+      "name": "acl_cat_string_returns_commands",
+      "now_ms": 90,
+      "argv": ["ACL", "CAT", "string"],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "array",
+        "value": [
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "set" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "get" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "incr" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "decr" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "incrby" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "decrby" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "incrbyfloat" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "mget" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "mset" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "msetnx" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "append" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "strlen" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "getrange" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "setrange" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "setnx" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "setex" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "psetex" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "getset" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "getdel" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "getex" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "substr" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "lcs" }
+        ]
+      }
+    },
+
+    {
+      "name": "acl_setuser_allcommands_allkeys",
+      "now_ms": 100,
+      "argv": ["ACL", "SETUSER", "fulluser", "on", "nopass", "allcommands", "allkeys"],
+      "expect": { "kind": "simple", "value": "OK" }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "acl_getuser_fulluser",
+      "now_ms": 101,
+      "argv": ["ACL", "GETUSER", "fulluser"],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "array",
+        "value": [
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "flags" },
+          { "kind": "array", "value": [{ "kind": "bulk", "value": "on" }, { "kind": "bulk", "value": "nopass" }] },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "passwords" },
+          { "kind": "array", "value": [] },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "commands" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "+@all" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "keys" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "~*" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "channels" },
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "&*" }
+        ]
+      }
+    },
+
+    {
+      "name": "acl_deluser_cleanup_testuser",
+      "now_ms": 110,
+      "argv": ["ACL", "DELUSER", "testuser"],
+      "expect": { "kind": "integer", "value": 1 }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "acl_deluser_cleanup_disabled_user",
+      "now_ms": 111,
+      "argv": ["ACL", "DELUSER", "disabled_user"],
+      "expect": { "kind": "integer", "value": 1 }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "acl_deluser_cleanup_rpuser",
+      "now_ms": 112,
+      "argv": ["ACL", "DELUSER", "rpuser"],
+      "expect": { "kind": "integer", "value": 1 }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "acl_deluser_cleanup_fulluser",
+      "now_ms": 113,
+      "argv": ["ACL", "DELUSER", "fulluser"],
+      "expect": { "kind": "integer", "value": 1 }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "acl_deluser_cleanup_carol",
+      "now_ms": 114,
+      "argv": ["ACL", "DELUSER", "carol"],
+      "expect": { "kind": "integer", "value": 1 }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "acl_deluser_cleanup_dave",
+      "now_ms": 115,
+      "argv": ["ACL", "DELUSER", "dave"],
+      "expect": { "kind": "integer", "value": 1 }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "acl_deluser_cleanup_bob",
+      "now_ms": 116,
+      "argv": ["ACL", "DELUSER", "bob"],
+      "expect": { "kind": "integer", "value": 1 }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "acl_users_only_default_after_cleanup",
+      "now_ms": 117,
+      "argv": ["ACL", "USERS"],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "array",
+        "value": [
+          { "kind": "bulk", "value": "default" }
+        ]
+      }
     }
   ]
 }
